title: fix(server): support Zod v4 in query parameter type detection

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: feat: Add Standard Schema support with Zod v3/v4 compatibility
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: supersedes — PR #12238 was merged on March 9 and already introduced the exact same getZodTypeName() and isComplexType() functions with Zod v3/v4 support in route-builder.ts. This PR's diff is now purely a cosmetic refactor (Set lookups, comment removal) of the code #12238 already landed.

relatedIssues.title: [BUG] Studio Observability Date Filter Invalid Parameters

summary: Refactors getZodTypeName() and isComplexType() in route-builder.ts to use Set-based lookups and removes verbose comments. Originally intended to fix Zod v4 query param detection, but PR #12238 (merged March 9, 257 files) already landed the same Zod v3/v4 compatibility fix in route-builder.ts. The code on main already has working v3/v4 support. This PR now only provides a minor style refactor (Set vs || chains, fewer comments). Notably, the PR removes the `.def` fallback in getZodTypeName(), which could reduce v4 compatibility if .def is used by some Zod v4 schemas.
maintainerNotes: PR #12238 was merged 2 hours before this PR's last update and already contains the substantive Zod v4 fix for route-builder.ts. This PR is now a cosmetic refactor of that same code. CI has several failures (Build, Core tests, Agent Builder tests, Observability tests, Validate build outputs) — likely due to the branch needing a rebase after #12238's 257-file merge. The approval from abhiaiyer91 may have been given before #12238 landed. The removal of the `?? schemaAny?.def` fallback in getZodTypeName() is a potential regression worth noting. Consider closing in favor of #12238's already-merged fix, or requesting a rebase if the Set-based refactor is desired.
